used.author: Albert Einstein
used.key: THE PERSON WHO NEVER MADE A MISTAKE NEVER TRIED ANYTHING NEW
used.quote: THE PERSON WHO NEVER MADE A MISTAKE NEVER TRIED ANYTHING NEW.

used.author: Martin Luther King, Jr.
used.key: IF I CANNOT DO GREAT THINGS I CAN DO SMALL THINGS IN A GREAT WAY
used.quote: IF I CANNOT DO GREAT THINGS. I CAN DO SMALL THINGS IN A GREAT WAY.

used.author: Anne Frank
used.key: LAZINESS MAY APPEAR ATTRACTIVE BUT WORK GIVES SATISFACTION
used.quote: LAZINESS MAY APPEAR ATTRACTIVE, BUT WORK GIVES SATISFACTION.

used.author: Vaclav Havel
used.key: THE ONLY LOST CAUSE IS ONE WE GIVE UP ON BEFORE WE ENTER THE STRUGGLE
used.quote: THE ONLY LOST CAUSE IS ONE WE GIVE UP ON BEFORE WE ENTER THE STRUGGLE.

used.author: Vince Lombardi
used.key: IT S NOT WHETHER YOU GET KNOCKED DOWN ITS WHETHER YOU GET BACK UP
used.quote: IT'S NOT WHETHER YOU GET KNOCKED DOWN, ITS WHETHER YOU GET BACK UP.

used.author: Chinese Proverb
used.key: HE WHO CHEATS THE EARTH WILL BE CHEATED BY THE EARTH
used.quote: HE WHO CHEATS THE EARTH WILL BE CHEATED BY THE EARTH.

used.author: George Bernard Shaw
used.key: IMAGINATION IS THE BEGINNING OF CREATION
used.quote: IMAGINATION IS THE BEGINNING OF CREATION.

used.author: Unknown
used.key: YOU MAY BE ONE PERSON IN THIS WORLD BUT TO ONE PERSON YOU MAY MEAN THE WORLD
used.quote: YOU MAY BE ONE PERSON IN THIS WORLD, BUT TO ONE PERSON YOU MAY MEAN THE WORLD.

used.author: Thich Nhat Hanh
used.key: EVERYTHING IS IN YOUR OWN HEART
used.quote: EVERYTHING IS IN YOUR OWN HEART.

used.author: Audrey Hepburn
used.key: GIVING IS LIVING IF YOU STOP WANTING TO GIVE THERE S NOTHING MORE TO LIVE FOR
used.quote: GIVING IS LIVING. IF YOU STOP WANTING TO GIVE, THERE'S NOTHING MORE TO LIVE FOR.

used.author: Christopher McCandless
used.key: THE JOY OF LIFE COMES FROM OUR ENCOUNTERS WITH NEW EXPERIENCES
used.quote: THE JOY OF LIFE COMES FROM OUR ENCOUNTERS WITH NEW EXPERIENCES.

used.author: Roy T. Bennett
used.key: IF YOU CARE ABOUT SOMEONE ENOUGH YOU LL ALWAYS BE THERE FOR THEM NO MATTER WHAT
used.quote: IF YOU CARE ABOUT SOMEONE ENOUGH, YOU'LL ALWAYS BE THERE FOR THEM NO MATTER WHAT.

used.author: Naval Ravikant
used.key: YOU CAN HAVE THE MIND OR YOU CAN HAVE THE MOMENT
used.quote: YOU CAN HAVE THE MIND OR YOU CAN HAVE THE MOMENT.
